017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.util.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.*;
025
026/**
027 * Utility classes.
028 *
029 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
030 *    <li class='link'>{doc jmr.RdfDetails}
031
032 * </ul>
033 */
034public class RdfUtils {
035
036   private RdfUtils() {}
037
038   /**
039    * Find the namespace given a list of <ja>@Rdf</ja> and <ja>@RdfSchema</ja> annotations.
040    *
041    * <p>
042    * The annotations should be a child-to-parent ordering of annotations found on a class or method.
043    *
044    * @param rdfs The <c>@Rdf</c> annotations to search.
045    * @param schemas The list of known RDF schemas.
046    * @return The resolved namespace, or <jk>null</jk> if the namespace could not be resolved.
047    */
048   public static Namespace findNamespace(List<Rdf> rdfs, List<RdfSchema> schemas) {
049
050      for (var rdf : rdfs) {
051         var ns = findNamespace(rdf.prefix(), rdf.namespace(), rdfs, schemas);
052         if (nn(ns))
053            return ns;
054      }
055
056      for (var schema : schemas) {
057         var ns = findNamespace(schema.prefix(), schema.namespace(), null, schemas);
058         if (nn(ns))
059            return ns;
060      }
061
062      return null;
063   }
064
065   @SuppressWarnings({
066      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for exhaustive RDF namespace resolution across annotation hierarchies
067   })
068   private static Namespace findNamespace(String prefix, String ns, List<Rdf> rdfs, List<RdfSchema> schemas) {
069
070      // If both prefix and namespace specified, use that Namespace mapping.
071      if (! (prefix.isEmpty() || ns.isEmpty()))
072         return Namespace.of(prefix, ns);
073
074      // If only prefix specified, need to search for namespaceURI.
075      if (! prefix.isEmpty()) {
076         if (nn(rdfs))
077            for (var rdf2 : rdfs)
078               if (rdf2.prefix().equals(prefix) && ! rdf2.namespace().isEmpty())
079                  return Namespace.of(prefix, rdf2.namespace());
080         for (var schema : schemas) {
081            if (schema.prefix().equals(prefix) && ! schema.namespace().isEmpty())
082               return Namespace.of(prefix, schema.namespace());
083            for (var rdfNs : schema.rdfNs())
084               if (rdfNs.prefix().equals(prefix))
085                  return Namespace.of(prefix, rdfNs.namespaceURI());
086         }
087         throw bex("Found @Rdf.prefix annotation with no matching URI.  prefix='" + prefix + "'");
088      }
089
090      // If only namespaceURI specified, need to search for prefix.
091      if (! ns.isEmpty()) {
092         if (nn(rdfs))
093            for (var rdf2 : rdfs)
094               if (rdf2.namespace().equals(ns) && ! rdf2.prefix().isEmpty())
095                  return Namespace.of(rdf2.prefix(), ns);
096         for (var schema : schemas) {
097            if (schema.namespace().equals(ns) && ! schema.prefix().isEmpty())
098               return Namespace.of(schema.prefix(), ns);
099            for (var rdfNs : schema.rdfNs())
100               if (rdfNs.namespaceURI().equals(ns))
101                  return Namespace.of(rdfNs.prefix(), ns);
102         }
103      }
104
105      return null;
106   }
107}
